title: Trump administration to stop work on 'anti-weaponization' fund
shortDescription: The Justice Department said it "will abide" by a federal judge's temporary order blocking the creation of Trump's $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund.

title: Iowa GOP governor race takes negative turn ahead of June 2 primary
shortDescription: Iowa’s GOP governor candidates are making their final pitches to voters as they hope to lock in support ahead of Tuesday’s primary elections.

title: Beyond Comey, Trump administration takes on DC group over '8647'
shortDescription: The ACLU of DC alleged the incident was retaliatory, but the government characterized it as a security issue amid a "heightened threat environment."

title: Election-denying Colorado clerk Tina Peters released from prison
shortDescription: Former clerk Tina Peters was released from prison early after Governor Jared Polis commuted her nine-year sentence.

title: Is the Great American State Fair happening? What to know as Trump steps in
shortDescription: After several artists pulled out of the Great American State Fair over the weekend, President Trump said the show would have a new headliner: himself.

title: Trump on Iran peace talks: 'If they're over, they're over'
shortDescription: President Trump downplayed the potential collapse of peace talks with Iran, telling CNBC the negotiations "started to get very boring."

title: Will Trump’s name be removed from Kennedy Center? Appeal may cause delays
shortDescription: The center has two weeks to remove all references to Trump from the performing arts center, a judge ruled on May 29. The administration has vowed an appeal.

title: Jill Biden says Joe Biden will have cancer for 'rest of his life'
shortDescription: Former first lady Jill Biden is opening up about her husband's health.

title: Why all eyes are on Ohio Senate race between Jon Husted, Sherrod Brown
shortDescription: Ohio is once again at the center of a national fight for the U.S. Senate. This time, it's Sen. Jon Husted vs. Sherrod Brown.

title: Trump renews promise to campaign in Texas for Ken Paxton in interview
shortDescription: Trump initially said he would do some "nice, big, beautiful rallies" for Paxton, who is facing Texas Rep. James Talarico in November.

title: Trump's latest ballroom defense: A rooftop 'DronePort'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says adding a drone facility to the new White House ballroom could help protect Washington, DC, from modern threats.

title: Ex-border chief rips Trump aides for 'pushing to dial back' deportations
shortDescription: Greg Bovino was ousted from his post as U.S. Border Patrol commander-at-large in January after the fatal shooting of two U.S. citizens in Minneapolis.

title: Republicans still lead Texas governor, attorney general races
shortDescription: Republicans Greg Abbott and Mayes Middleton lead Democrats by 5 points each in new Texas poll, even as James Talarico leads Ken Paxton in Senate race.

title: Trump threatens to cancel 250 concert
shortDescription: Trump criticized the musicians pulling out of a series of planned concerts on the National Mall celebrating the nations 250th anniversary.

title: Trump seeks to revive Iran peace talks after negotiations stall
shortDescription: Iran had announced they would suspend negotiations over Israel's campaign against Lebanon.

title: Trump wants a rooftop 'DronePort' for his controversial new ballroom
shortDescription: Trump said that if a judge doesn't approve the new White House ballroom, he'll be "held responsible for the Death and Destruction."
